chapter_title.en: Chapter on Days and Times Recommended for Travel and Days and Times Disliked for Travel

text: 2392 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : « يَوْمُ اَلْخَمِيسِ يَوْمٌ يُحِبُّهُ اَللَّهُ وَ رَسُولُهُ وَ مَلاَئِكَتُهُ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2392 - Imam (as) said: "Thursday is a day loved by Allah (swt), His Messenger, and His angels."
